title: Armor Status
description: Displays your armor durability and status in real time with a clean, lightweight HUD.
body:
# 🛡️ Armor Status

Armor Status is a lightweight, client-side mod that displays your armor durability and status in real time with a clean, minimal HUD. No more surprise armor breaks — stay informed at a glance.

# ✨ Features

- Real-time armor durability display

- Clean and unobtrusive HUD

- Lightweight & performance-friendly

- Great for Survival, Hardcore, and PvP

- Client-side only

# 📜 License

Free to use. No modifying, selling, or reuploading.

# 🌐 Socials
